name: node-nstool
description: Node native module to access nstool.

scripts.build-libraries: npm-run-all --parallel libfmt liblz4 libmbedtls --serial libtoolchain libpietendo
scripts.libfmt: cd deps/nstool/deps/libfmt && cmake-js rebuild && node ../../../../scripts/copy-library.js libfmt
scripts.liblz4: cd deps/nstool/deps/liblz4 && cmake-js rebuild && node ../../../../scripts/copy-library.js liblz4
scripts.libmbedtls: cd deps/nstool/deps/libmbedtls && cmake-js rebuild && node ../../../../scripts/copy-library.js libmbedtls
scripts.libtoolchain: cd deps/nstool/deps/libtoolchain && cmake-js rebuild && node ../../../../scripts/copy-library.js libtoolchain
scripts.libpietendo: cd deps/nstool/deps/libpietendo && cmake-js rebuild && node ../../../../scripts/copy-library.js libpietendo
